tests.current_optimized_program:
define i1 @range0to8most_significant_bit(i8 range(i8 0, 8) %f) {
bb3:
  %0 = sub i8 %f, 4
  %switch.and = and i8 %0, -4
  %switch.selectcmp = icmp eq i8 %switch.and, 0
  %1 = select i1 %switch.selectcmp, i1 true, i1 false
  ret i1 %1
}
tests.expect_optimized_program:
define i1 @range0to8most_significant_bit(i8 range(i8 0, 8) %f) {
bb3:
  %0 = and i8 %f, 4
  %1 = icmp eq i8 %0, 4
  %2 = select i1 %1, i1 true, i1 false
  ret i1 %2
}
tests.source_program:
define i1 @range0to8most_significant_bit(i8 range(i8 0, 8) %f) {
  switch i8 %f, label %bb1 [
    i8 4, label %bb2
    i8 5, label %bb2
    i8 6, label %bb2
    i8 7, label %bb2
  ]

bb1:                                              ; preds = %0
  br label %bb3

bb2:                                              ; preds = %0, %0, %0, %0
  br label %bb3

bb3:                                              ; preds = %bb2, %bb1
  %phi = phi i1 [ false, %bb1 ], [ true, %bb2 ]
  ret i1 %phi
}
tests.test_body:

    i8 7, label %bb2

bb1:                                              ; preds = %0

bb2:                                              ; preds = %0, %0, %0, %0
  br label %bb3

bb3:                                              ; preds = %bb2, %bb1
  %phi = phi i1 [ false, %bb1 ], [ true, %bb2 ]
  ret i1 %phi
}

issue.author: nikic
issue.body:
https://alive2.llvm.org/ce/z/7A_uJr

```llvm
define i1 @src(i8 range(i8 0, 4) %arg) {
  %add = add nsw i8 %arg, -1
  %and = and i8 %add, -3
  %cmp = icmp eq i8 %and, 0
  ret i1 %cmp
}

define i1 @tgt(i8 range(i8 0, 4) %arg) {
  %and = and i8 %arg, 1
  %cmp = icmp ne i8 %and, 0
  ret i1 %cmp
}
```

Not sure how to generalize this best.

comments.author: spaits
comments.body: @nikic I have created a solution for this, that has been merged. Should we mention this commit under the Rust ticket (https://github.com/rust-lang/rust/issues/141497) too or even close the ticket?

issue.title: [InstCombine] Missed optimization for add + and + icmp pattern
